Available locales

Create fake colors

ch_company()

Create fake company names and other company bits

ch_credit_card_provider() ch_credit_card_number() ch_credit_card_security_code()

Create fake credit card data

ch_currency()

Create fake currencies

ch_doi()

Create fake DOIs (Digital Object Identifiers)

ch_gene_sequence()

Create fake gene sequences

ch_generate()

Generate a fake dataset

ch_job()

Create fake jobs

ch_missing()

Create missing data

ch_name()

Create fake person names

ch_phone_number()

Create fake phone numbers

charlatan-package

charlatan

charlatan_locales()

Available locales

charlatan_settings()

charlatan settings

ch_lon() ch_lat() ch_position()

Create fake coordinates

ch_timezone() ch_unix_time() ch_date_time()

Create dates and times

ch_element_symbol() ch_element_element()

Get elements

fraudster()

Fraudster - catch all client to make all types of fake data

ch_double() ch_integer() ch_unif() ch_norm() ch_lnorm() ch_beta()

Create numbers

ch_taxonomic_genus() ch_taxonomic_epithet() ch_taxonomic_species()

Create fake taxonomic names
